title: epipactis ulugurica
intro: Epipactis ulugurica, also known as the Chinese Helleborine or Ulugurica orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Epipactis ulugurica include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are then used to treat various health conditions.
